title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 28 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 28 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 28 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/08/2024
Today, iron ore futures were strong initially but weakened later. The most-traded contract I2501 finally closed at 754.5 yuan/mt, almost flatcompared to yesterday. Traders sold according to market conditions, and steel mills restocked as needed.
